017package org.apache.juneau.microservice.test;
018
019import java.lang.reflect.*;
020import java.net.*;
021import java.util.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.junit5.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.junit5.JuneauBeanStoreExtension.OverrideSet;
026import org.apache.juneau.microservice.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.client.*;
029import org.eclipse.jetty.server.*;
030import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.*;
031
032/**
033 * JUnit 5 extension behind {@link MicroserviceTest @MicroserviceTest}: boots a whole
034 * {@link Microservice} (config + lifecycle + embedded Jetty on an ephemeral port) for the test class, with
035 * {@link org.apache.juneau.junit5.TestBean @TestBean} mock-bean injection and convenience parameter resolution.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='topic'>Lifecycle (per class)</h5>
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * The microservice is built + {@link Microservice#start() started} once in {@code beforeAll} and
041 * {@link Microservice#stop() stopped} in {@code afterAll}. A fresh instance is booted per class and stopped
042 * cleanly &mdash; never reused, since {@code Microservice} restart is unsupported (the {@code stopped} flag is
043 * one-way, the bean store is closed, and each {@code start()} adds a JVM shutdown hook). The bound port is read
044 * from the live {@link ServerConnector} (never hard-coded), mirroring the established fixture pattern.
045 *
046 * <h5 class='topic'>Mock-bean injection</h5>
047 *
048 * <p>
049 * {@link org.apache.juneau.junit5.TestBean @TestBean} declarations are discovered via
050 * {@link JuneauBeanStoreExtension#discoverOverrides(Object)}. <b>Mode INJECT</b> (the default) installs the
051 * overrides via {@code Microservice.Builder.overridingBeanStore(...)} <i>before</i> boot, so the service reads
052 * them from startup. <b>Mode OVERLAY</b> pushes the overrides onto the booted instance's bean store for the
053 * class duration and pops them in teardown.
054 *
055 * <h5 class='topic'>Parameter resolution</h5>
056 *
057 * <p>
058 * Resolves {@link RestClient} (bound to the booted root URL), {@link Microservice}, {@link WritableBeanStore},
059 * and the bound port ({@code int} / {@code Integer}) on test + lifecycle method parameters.
060 *
061 * @since 10.0.0
062 */
063@SuppressWarnings({
064   "resource", // The Microservice + RestClient are owned by this extension and closed/stopped in afterAll(); not unmanaged leaks.
065   "java:S3011" // setAccessible on the test class's no-arg ctor / builder-supplier method is intentional - the same reflective access JUnit itself uses to drive user test classes.
066})
067public class MicroserviceExtension implements BeforeAllCallback, AfterAllCallback, ParameterResolver {
068
069   /** Default name of the optional {@code static Microservice.Builder} supplier method on the test class. */
070   public static final String BUILDER_SUPPLIER_METHOD = "microserviceBuilder";
071
072   private static final ExtensionContext.Namespace NAMESPACE = ExtensionContext.Namespace.create(MicroserviceExtension.class);
073   private static final String KEY_STATE = "state";
074
075   /** Per-class booted state. */
076   private static final class State {
077      Microservice microservice;
078      RestClient client;
079      URI rootUrl;
080      WritableBeanStore beanStore;
081      Snapshot overlaySnapshot;   // non-null when Mode OVERLAY was pushed
082   }
083
084   @Override /* BeforeAllCallback */
085   public void beforeAll(ExtensionContext context) throws Exception {
086      var testClass = context.getRequiredTestClass();
087      var ann = findAnnotation(testClass);
088
089      // Discover @TestBean overrides from the test class (static members participate at class-boot time).
090      var instance = instantiateForDiscovery(testClass);
091      var overrides = JuneauBeanStoreExtension.discoverOverrides(instance);
092
093      var builder = resolveBuilder(testClass, ann);
094
095      // The user's configurations come first (so @Bean Servlet methods are visible), then the ephemeral Jetty
096      // server (port 0), then JettyConfiguration wires the lifecycle. BeanStore returns the first registered
097      // match, so a user-supplied @Bean Server still wins.
098      builder.configurations(ann.configurations());
099      builder.configurations(EphemeralJettyServerConfig.class, JettyConfiguration.class);
100
101      var injecting = ! overrides.isEmpty() && overrides.mode() == Mode.INJECT;
102      if (injecting)
103         builder.overridingBeanStore(overrides.store());
104
105      var state = new State();
106      state.microservice = builder.build();
107      state.microservice.start();
108      state.beanStore = state.microservice.getBeanStore();
109      state.rootUrl = resolveRootUrl(state.microservice);
110      state.client = RestClient.builder().rootUrl(state.rootUrl.toString()).build();
111
112      // Mode OVERLAY: push the overrides onto the booted instance's bean store for the class duration.
113      if (! overrides.isEmpty() && overrides.mode() == Mode.OVERLAY)
114         state.overlaySnapshot = state.beanStore.pushOverlay(overrides.store());
115
116      context.getStore(NAMESPACE).put(KEY_STATE, state);
117   }
118
119   @Override /* AfterAllCallback */
120   public void afterAll(ExtensionContext context) {
121      var state = (State) context.getStore(NAMESPACE).remove(KEY_STATE);
122      if (state == null)
123         return;
124      try {
125         if (state.overlaySnapshot != null)
126            state.beanStore.popOverlay(state.overlaySnapshot);
127      } finally {
128         try {
129            if (state.client != null)
130               state.client.close();
131         } catch (Exception e) {  // HTT: RestClient.close() failure is not reproducible against the in-process JDK transport.
132            // Best-effort close; never mask teardown.
133         } finally {
134            if (state.microservice != null)
135               safeStop(state.microservice);
136         }
137      }
138   }
139
140   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
141   // ParameterResolver
142   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
143
144   @Override /* ParameterResolver */
145   public boolean supportsParameter(ParameterContext pc, ExtensionContext ec) {
146      var t = pc.getParameter().getType();
147      return t == RestClient.class || t == Microservice.class || t == WritableBeanStore.class
148         || t == int.class || t == Integer.class;
149   }
150
151   @Override /* ParameterResolver */
152   public Object resolveParameter(ParameterContext pc, ExtensionContext ec) {
153      var state = readState(ec);
154      if (state == null)
155         throw new ParameterResolutionException("@MicroserviceTest has no booted microservice to resolve from.");
156      var t = pc.getParameter().getType();
157      if (t == RestClient.class)
158         return state.client;
159      if (t == Microservice.class)
160         return state.microservice;
161      if (t == WritableBeanStore.class)
162         return state.beanStore;
163      if (t == int.class || t == Integer.class)
164         return state.rootUrl.getPort();
165      throw new ParameterResolutionException("Unsupported @MicroserviceTest parameter type: " + t.getName());
166   }
167
168   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
169   // Helpers
170   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
171
172   private static MicroserviceTest findAnnotation(Class<?> testClass) {
173      for (var c = testClass; c != null; c = c.getSuperclass()) {
174         var a = c.getAnnotation(MicroserviceTest.class);
175         if (a != null)
176            return a;
177      }
178      throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest annotation not found on " + testClass.getName());
179   }
180
181   private static Microservice.Builder resolveBuilder(Class<?> testClass, MicroserviceTest ann) {
182      var m = findBuilderSupplier(testClass, ann.builderMethod());
183      if (m == null)
184         return Microservice.create();
185      try {
186         m.setAccessible(true);
187         var result = m.invoke(null);
188         if (! (result instanceof Microservice.Builder b))
189            throw new ExtensionContextException(
190               "@MicroserviceTest builder method '" + ann.builderMethod() + "' on " + testClass.getName()
191               + " must return a Microservice.Builder.");
192         return b;
193      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException e) {
194         throw new ExtensionContextException(
195            "Failed to invoke @MicroserviceTest builder method '" + ann.builderMethod() + "' on " + testClass.getName(), e);
196      }
197   }
198
199   private static Method findBuilderSupplier(Class<?> testClass, String name) {
200      for (var c = testClass; c != null; c = c.getSuperclass()) {
201         try {
202            var m = c.getDeclaredMethod(name);
203            if (Modifier.isStatic(m.getModifiers()))
204               return m;
205            throw new ExtensionContextException(
206               "@MicroserviceTest builder method '" + name + "' on " + c.getName() + " must be static.");
207         } catch (NoSuchMethodException e) {
208            // Try the superclass.
209         }
210      }
211      return null;
212   }
213
214   /**
215    * Instantiates the test class via its no-arg constructor purely to drive {@code @TestBean} discovery (which
216    * reads instance + static members). Falls back to a hierarchy-static-only scan if no usable no-arg ctor exists.
217    */
218   private static Object instantiateForDiscovery(Class<?> testClass) {
219      try {
220         var ctor = testClass.getDeclaredConstructor();
221         ctor.setAccessible(true);
222         return ctor.newInstance();
223      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException e) {
224         // No accessible no-arg ctor (e.g. @TestInstance(PER_CLASS) with constructor injection). Static-only
225         // @TestBean discovery still works via a throwaway minimal instance of Object's identity is impossible,
226         // so re-raise with guidance.
227         throw new ExtensionContextException(
228            "@MicroserviceTest requires a no-arg constructor on " + testClass.getName()
229            + " to discover @TestBean overrides before boot.", e);
230      }
231   }
232
233   private static URI resolveRootUrl(Microservice microservice) {
234      var component = microservice.getBeanStore().getBean(JettyServerComponent.class).orElseThrow(
235         () -> new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest could not find a JettyServerComponent after start()."));
236      var server = component.getServer();
237      var localPort = -1;
238      for (var c : server.getConnectors()) {
239         if (c instanceof ServerConnector sc) {
240            localPort = sc.getLocalPort();
241            break;
242         }
243      }
244      if (localPort <= 0)
245         throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest could not determine the bound ServerConnector port after start().");
246      return URI.create("http://localhost:" + localPort);
247   }
248
249   private static void safeStop(Microservice microservice) {
250      try {
251         microservice.stop();
252      } catch (Exception e) {  // HTT: Microservice.stop() failure mid-teardown is not reproducible in the happy-path test boot.
253         throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest failed to stop the microservice.", e);
254      }
255   }
256
257   private static State readState(ExtensionContext context) {
258      for (var c = context; c != null; c = c.getParent().orElse(null)) {
259         var s = (State) c.getStore(NAMESPACE).get(KEY_STATE);
260         if (s != null)
261            return s;
262      }
263      return null;
264   }
265}
